rules.title: Context Retrieval & Token Optimization
rules.description: Minimize token usage through efficient context loading strategies using index files and targeted reads.

rules.description: Systematic rule application based on development context for consistent code quality.

rules.title: ESLint Configuration & Compliance
rules.description: Enforce code quality and consistency through ESLint configuration and automatic fixes.

rules.title: Implementation Approval Protocol
rules.description: Require explicit human approval before implementing high-level architectural or design decisions.

rules.title: Markdown Maintenance for AI Context
rules.description: Maintain accurate line numbers and navigation in markdown files for efficient AI context retrieval.

rules.title: Package.json Management & Dependencies
rules.description: Manage package.json dependencies, scripts, and metadata with validation and best practices.

rules.title: Package Manager Safety & Standards
rules.description: Prevent destructive package operations by blocking --force flags and requiring human approval.

rules.title: Semantic Versioning for Package Management
rules.description: Follow semantic versioning standards for package version management and changelog updates.

rules.title: Absolute Imports Configuration
rules.description: Configure and use absolute imports with @ alias for cleaner, more maintainable import statements.

rules.title: Component Organization & Structure
rules.description: Organize React/TypeScript components with consistent structure, barrel exports, and clear separation.

rules.title: React Props Destructuring Pattern
rules.description: Use destructured props in React components for better readability and type safety.

rules.title: TypeScript Compilation Validation
rules.description: Mandate TypeScript compilation validation after every file change to catch errors early.

rules.title: Git Repository Management
rules.description: Manage git operations safely with human review for commits and protection against destructive commands.

rules.title: Chakra UI v3 Integration with MCP Tools
rules.description: Integrate Chakra UI v3 components using MCP tools for accurate component reference and usage.

rules.title: GlueStack UI v1 (Themed) Component Patterns
rules.description: Use GlueStack UI v1 themed components with proper configuration and consistent patterns.

rules.description: Standardize icon usage across the project with consistent libraries and naming conventions.

rules.title: Mock Data Strategy for Frontend Development
rules.description: Use realistic mock data in frontend development with clear separation from production data.

rules.title: React Native Component Patterns (GlueStack UI v1)
rules.description: Strict patterns for React Native component creation with GlueStack UI v1 themed components.

rules.title: Visual Verification for UI Changes
rules.description: Verify UI changes through screenshot analysis and evidence-based validation before completion.

rules.title: Multi-Environment Management & Protection
rules.description: Protect production environment files while allowing safe access to dev and QA configurations.

rules.title: Lua Library Semantic Versioning
rules.description: Maintain proper semantic versioning for Lua libraries through metadata file updates.

rules.title: Temporary Test File Cleanup Protocol
rules.description: Manage temporary test files created for validation without polluting the repository.

rules.title: Go Style & Best Practices
rules.description: Idiomatic Go style, formatting, naming, and error handling conventions
